name: ecc
description: Project-local ECC workflows for Codex: shared skills and conventions for TDD, security scanning, code review, and autonomous development.

interface.shortDescription: ECC skills for TDD, security, code review, and autonomous development.
interface.longDescription: ECC is a harness-native operator system for Codex and adjacent agent harnesses. This project-local plugin points at the repository's .agents/skills directory so Codex can discover the vendored ECC skill surface.
defaultPrompt: Use the tdd-workflow skill to write tests before implementation.
Use the security-review skill to scan for OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities.
Use the verification-loop skill to verify correctness before shipping changes.
